repair_candidate.summary: Repair #90468 by preserving the intended apostrophe fix while addressing the maintainer's parser regressions: keep valid shell-style single-quote concatenation working and prevent plural possessives from being consumed as quote delimiters when a later quoted span exists.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): repair apostrophe parsing in prompt-template args
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repairs #90468 while preserving @yetval's original fix and attribution.

Summary:
- keep ordinary apostrophes/contractions literal in slash-command prompt-template arguments
- preserve valid shell-style single-quote concatenation such as foo'bar baz' next
- add regression coverage for plural possessives before later quoted spans

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90468
Credit: original implementation and bug report by @yetval; repair follows maintainer review feedback from vincentkoc.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run packages/agent-core/src/harness/prompt-templates.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Repair source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90468 by @yetval; preserve contributor attribution in commits/PR body.
Mention maintainer review by vincentkoc as the source of the two required parser regression fixes.
